body:
🔴 **Tool Issue** — `review/arm-alertsmanagement-node.api.md:268-272`

```ts
export enum AzureClouds {
    AZURE_CHINA_CLOUD = "AZURE_CHINA_CLOUD",
    AZURE_PUBLIC_CLOUD = "AZURE_PUBLIC_CLOUD",
    AZURE_US_GOVERNMENT = "AZURE_US_GOVERNMENT"
}
```

The `AzureClouds` enum members use `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE`, which is inconsistent with all other enums in this package (e.g., `KnownAlertState`, `KnownSeverity`, `KnownMonitorCondition`) which use `PascalCase`. This is a tool-side issue.

**Fix:** Report this inconsistency in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues) and request that `AzureClouds` enum members be renamed to PascalCase (e.g., `AzureChineCloud`, `AzurePublicCloud`, `AzureUsGovernment`).

2 findings for `@azure/arm-alertsmanagement@1.0.0-beta.1`: 1 tool issue (`AzureClouds` UPPER_SNAKE_CASE enum values) and 1 design issue (`ProxyResource_1` duplicate model with numeric suffix). All other exported symbols, version alignment, and CHANGELOG look correct for a new beta package.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37870,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/alertsmanagement/arm-alertsmanagement/review/arm-alertsmanagement-node.api.md","line":268,"issueType":"tool","category":"naming","description":"AzureClouds enum uses UPPER_SNAKE_CASE values inconsistent with all other enums in the package which use PascalCase"},{"file":"sdk/alertsmanagement/arm-alertsmanagement/review/arm-alertsmanagement-node.api.md","line":618,"issueType":"design","category":"naming","description":"ProxyResource_1 _N suffix indicates duplicate model; should use @clientName in spec to give it a distinct name"}]}
```

</details>

## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- ❌ **Merge Conflict**: `pnpm-lock.yaml`, `.github/CODEOWNERS`, and `eng/ignore-links.txt` all conflict with `main`. Since multiple files are conflicted, this requires a manual rebase. Please follow the [conflict resolution guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/blob/main/documentation/resolve-pnpm-lock-merge-conflict.md):
  1. `git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main`
  2. Resolve conflicts in `.github/CODEOWNERS` and `eng/ignore-links.txt` (accept both sides — your additions are additive)
  3. For `pnpm-lock.yaml`: `git checkout origin/main -- pnpm-lock.yaml && NPM_CONFIG_REGISTRY=https://registry.npmjs.org/ pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile`
  4. `git add . && git rebase --continue`

<!-- mgmt-review-bot -->
